analysis.name: LAB
analysis.summary: LAB近期因生态扩张和回购计划大幅上涨，但近期因团队地址转移代币和ZachXBT警报导致价格回调。基本面有亮点，但供应集中和代币解锁风险高，短期波动大。

recommendation.invalidation: 价格跌破15美元或出现大额解锁/团队抛售消息

catalysts: 生态整合与合作伙伴关系
市场情绪回暖，LAB曾领涨山寨币

latestNews.title: LAB token drops 13.41% amid concerns over token supply and ownership concentration.
latestNews.reason: 供应集中和所有权问题引发抛售

latestNews.title: LAB falls 13% amid ZachXBT alerts & token unlock fears – But THESE metrics suggest…
latestNews.reason: ZachXBT警报和代币解锁担忧导致下跌

latestNews.title: LAB announces official launch of buyback program
latestNews.reason: 回购计划有助于支撑价格

fundamentals: LAB是首个一体化交易生态系统，提供快速执行、低费用和激励层
总供应量10亿，流通量3.125亿，流通率31.25%
市值约51.7亿美元，FDV约165亿美元
团队地址曾转移1亿代币至Bitget，占流通量43.4%
marketRead: 24小时跌幅16.4%，但7日涨幅25.6%，30日涨幅292%，波动极大
DEX流动性约37亿美元，但交易量仅284美元，流动性深度存疑
价格从ATH 27.3美元回调至16.55美元，跌幅39.5%
risks: 代币供应高度集中，团队地址转移代币引发抛售担忧
ZachXBT警报可能指向可疑活动
代币解锁压力大，未来供应增加
DEX流动性虽高但交易量极低，可能存在操纵
watchlist: 团队地址后续转账动态
价格能否守住15美元支撑
sourceNotes: 数据来源为CoinGecko、DexScreener和新闻聚合，部分新闻时间较早
DEX交易量极低，价格可能不反映真实市场

profile.name: LAB
profile.description: LAB is the first all-in-one trading ecosystem, enabling faster execution, the lowest market fees, and a viral incentive layer powered by $LAB. Integrated with existing trading platforms it allows to tap into an established network while creating a unified environment for a new trading experience. LAB brings together trading, analytics, asset management, and community tools for the modern trader. It goes beyond traditional trading by forming a connected ecosystem – delivering a powerful, unified experience for both new and experienced traders.
